author: fix-integer-overflow
content: Plan: (1) Change Integer→BigInteger in sqlalchemy_schema.py for all columns where test_values.py generates 2^63-1 values (visit_id, request_id, window_id, tab_id, frame_id, event_ordinal, duration, etc). Keep Integer for columns that only use 2^31-1 (browser_id, incognito, site_rank, retry_number, is_*). (2) Remove postgresql_scenario from structured_scenarios list in fixtures.py, create a separate postgresql_scenarios list and update test_sqlalchemy_provider.py to use separate parametrize for PG tests. (3) Add postgresql, psycopg2-binary, pytest-postgresql to environment-unpinned.yaml.
